narrative.quote: Friday's international-only shipping widened the gap to our $900K target, with backlog climbing to $1.29M despite operational improvements. We're executing cross-functional support strategies while managing reduced warehouse capacity from staffing challenges.

operationalRealities.title: Shipping Constraints
operationalRealities.detail: International-only protocol limits daily output, domestic holds reducing warehouse efficiency

operationalRealities.title: Staffing Challenges
operationalRealities.detail: Lab at 75% capacity with 3 of 4 staff, warehouse managing 3 absences with early start mitigation

operationalRealities.title: Backlog Growth
operationalRealities.detail: Net increase of $148K driven by incoming orders exceeding outbound shipments for 3 consecutive days

strategyUpdates: Cross-functional support initiatives activated with Nicole Sardo securing additional warehouse hands for kit assembly and afternoon pick/pack operations to offset headcount gaps.
Supplier expedite actions underway across 4 critical orders totaling $4.6K, with Vector Labs base unit confirmation pending EOD and SuperBioChips customs clearance tracking in Indianapolis.
